case_title: BHAVESHKUMAR GOHIL VS. JAMES GAINES et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOHIL, BHAVESHKUMAR DBA ALDRICH HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAINES, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 439 JONES STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102-UNIT 201, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOHIL, BHAVESHKUMAR DBA ALDRICH HOTEL SERVED SEP-06-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, JAMES

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, JAMES

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOHIL, BHAVESHKUMAR DBA ALDRICH HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
